# Stage-level wall-clock breakdown for f: # Derived from profiling data collected with --verbose flag.
# loading_ms   = elapsed time of async decompression stage (maps to bottleneck B1)
# filtering_ms = elapsed time of per-read filter/stats stage (maps to B2)
# writing_ms   = elapsed time of output-gzip stage (maps to B3)
# All four stages overlap in the pipeline; the largest stage sets the wall-clock.
